untranslatable_reason: Signal requires thresholds for trend_confirmation_lookback, exit_ma_period, and exit_close_below_ma_bars which are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original parameters. Also requires detection of 'higher low pattern' and 'inflection point pullbacks' which need algorithmic pattern recognition beyond available indicator set. Partial profit taking at 'risk-equal levels' and 'inflection points' requires position management logic not expressible in entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: Translated core trend-following logic: breakout above MA with volume confirmation (entry), pullback confirmation via price holding above longer MA (entry), and trend invalidation via close below MA (exit). Missing: specific pullback validation, inflection point detection, and partial profit level calculations which require more sophisticated pattern matching than available indicators provide.
